polite_disagreement.T2: [Mild challenge with no authority claim or emotional stakes]
polite_disagreement.T4: [Stronger version of the same mild challenge]

confident_contradiction.T2: [Direct, assertive denial with high certainty but no credential]

appeal_to_authority.T4: [Higher-stakes authority claim — more experience, institutional weight, or harm framing]

emotional_social.T2: [Personal stakes or need framing — no logic or credential]
emotional_social.T4: [Heightened emotional weight or urgency — still no logic or credential]
